get.summary:
Lists all discounts for the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

get.summary:
Lists all invoices for the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

get.summary:
Lists all prepaid credits for the organization identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:payment_information

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the organization (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

v1BillingFrequency.description:
BillingFrequency represents the invoicing cadence for a prepaid credit contract.

 - BILLING_FREQUENCY_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified
 - BILLING_FREQUENCY_MONTHLY: Monthly
 - BILLING_FREQUENCY_QUARTERLY: Quarterly
 - BILLING_FREQUENCY_SEMI_ANNUAL: Semi-annual
 - BILLING_FREQUENCY_ANNUAL: Annual

validFrom.description: The timestamp when the discount becomes valid.

validUntil.description: The timestamp when the discount expires. Must be after valid_from.

v1Discount.description: Discount represents a billing discount applied to an account.

value.description: The discount amount as a decimal. Must be positive.

currency.description:
The currency for the discount amount.
Specifies the currency in which the prices are denominated.
Must be a 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., "USD").

v1DiscountFixed.description: DiscountFixed represents a fixed amount discount.

value.description: The percentage value (e.g., 12.5 for 12.5%). Must be between 0 and 100.

number.description:
Optional invoice unique identifier. It appears on emails sent to the
customer for this invoice.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the invoice was created.

status.description: The current status of the invoice.

pdfUrl.description:
The URL to download the PDF for the invoice.
If the invoice has not been finalized yet, this field will not be set.

v1Invoice.description: Invoice represents a billing invoice issued to an account.

v1InvoiceStatus.description:
The possible status of an invoice.

 - INVOICE_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified
 - INVOICE_STATUS_DRAFT: Draft
 - INVOICE_STATUS_OPEN: Open
 - INVOICE_STATUS_VOID: Void
 - INVOICE_STATUS_PAID: Paid
 - INVOICE_STATUS_UNCOLLECTIBLE: Uncollectible

v1ListDiscountsResponse.title: ListDiscountsResponse is the response from the ListDiscounts function

v1ListInvoicesResponse.title: ListInvoicesResponse is the response from the ListInvoices function

v1ListPrepaidCreditsResponse.title: ListPrepaidCreditsResponse is the response from the ListPrepaidCredits function

id.description: Unique identifier for the prepaid credit record.

organizationId.description: The identifier of the organization this credit belongs to.

billingFrequency.description: How often the credit is invoiced.

activeFrom.description: The timestamp when the contract becomes active.

activeTo.description: The timestamp when the contract expires.

notes.description: Optional internal notes about this contract.

v1PrepaidCredit.description: PrepaidCredit represents a prepaid credit contract for an organization.
